name: Sorcery World
description:
The realm of sorcery unfolds in Japan, centered in the bustling metropolis of Tokyo.

Here, you can take on any role you desire: a sorcerer, a non-sorcerer, a demon of malevolence, a negativity user, or an OC. The choice is yours, I simply provide the world for them.

Immerse yourself in this intricate setting, forge alliances or rivalries, and shape your own adventure.
creator: MtnDewEnjoyer
